text:
Once upon a time in a small town no one ever talked about, there lived a cat named Luna. Luna was special. She didn’t have any siblings nor did she belong to anyone. Each day she would wander through the fields outside the town, dreaming of adventures far and wide.

One sunny morning, Luna basked in the sun’s rays. A group of squirrels was playing soccer in a old oak tree. They chased a nut that glowed like the moon. Curious, Luna approached them.

“Where’s your treasure?” Luna asked, flicking her graceful tail.

“Over there,” they squeaked. “But be careful—it’s enchanted!”

Luna tiptoed towards the glowing nut. It twinkled.

“Wouldn’t you like to go?”

“I’m the guardian of this nut!” one squirrel defended.

“Well,” Luna mused, “What’s the worst that could happen?”

She took a deep breath and tossed the nut into the air.

Nothing happened.
